notes: Swappable energy-storage items that live inside battery blocks. Power Cell is not directly craftable — it comes pre-installed in Battery blocks (the wiki explicitly says 'Build a battery block instead'). Power Module is listed in game data but is flagged as disabled / not obtainable in normal gameplay, similar to Stone in raw-resources.json. Capacity values are stored as the raw wiki numbers; the wiki uses the unit 'electricity' without explicitly annotating kWh/MWh, so capacity.unitAsPublished is 'electricity'.

resources.description: The swappable part of battery blocks.
resources.producedBy: Built into battery blocks (not directly craftable)
dataGaps: capacity.unitAsPublished (wiki just says 'electricity' — no kWh/MWh annotation)

resources.description: Electrical storage device with capacity 3,600,000 electricity units. Present in game data but not obtainable in normal gameplay.
dataGaps: producedBy (wiki: 'This item can not be obtained in normal gameplay')
